recommendations.title: Hello
recommendations.overview: Call-center workers receive a phone call from God.

recommendations.title: 7 Kilos in 7 Days
recommendations.overview: Two not very clever young doctors open a fitness center and promise to let people lose seven kilos in seven days. When the enterprise fails they open a gourmet restaurant.

recommendations.title: The Howling
recommendations.overview: After a bizarre and near fatal encounter with a serial killer, a newswoman is sent to a rehabilitation center whose inhabitants may not be what they seem.

recommendations.title: Elephant Song
recommendations.overview: A psychiatrist is drawn into a complex mind game when he questions a disturbed patient about the disappearance of a colleague.

recommendations.title: Patients
recommendations.overview: After a serious sport accident in a swimming pool, Ben, now an incomplete quadriplegic, arrives in a rehabilitation center. He meets with other handicapped persons (tetraplegics, paraplegics, traumatized crania), all victims of accidents, as well as

recommendations.title: My King
recommendations.overview: Tony is admitted to a rehabilitation center after a serious ski accident. Dependent on the medical staff and pain relievers, she takes time to look back on a turbulent relationship that she experienced with Georgio.

recommendations.title: Serial Driver
recommendations.overview: Pauline has her own way of doing road safety: as a trainer in a point recovery center during the day, she becomes a serial killer of drivers at night.

recommendations.title: Everybody Loves Somebody
recommendations.overview: On the surface, Clara Barron seems to have it all: a job as an OB-GYN; a great house in LA; and a loving family. But, the one thing Clara doesn't have figured out is her love life. Pressured by a family wedding in Mexico, Clara asks a co-worker to po

recommendations.title: The Other End of the Line
recommendations.overview: An employee at an Indian call-center travels to San Francisco to be with a guy she falls for over the phone.

recommendations.title: Meus 15 Anos: Filme
recommendations.overview: A shy student suddenly becomes the center of attention when she wins a huge birthday party that she never asked for.
